title: [NO TESTS NEEDED] Allow setting of machine stream and image path from containers.conf
body:
Allow setting of machine stream and image path from containers.conf
Vendor in new common

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: ah. this needs https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11263 to get in before it'll pass tests.
